text: Reporter: Why did you attack Pope Leo? Trump: I don’t think he’s doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess. We don’t like a pope who says it’s ok to have a nuclear weapon. We don’t want a pope that says crime is ok. I am not a big fan of Pope Leo.
text_zh: 记者：您为什么攻击教皇利奥？特朗普：我觉得他干得不怎么样。我猜他喜欢犯罪。我们不喜欢那种说拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我们不想要一个说犯罪没问题的教皇。我不太喜欢教皇利奥。

text: 🇺🇸 So the “Trump Jesus” post was already made on February 4 by Nick Adams, whom Trump appointed as Special Presidential Envoy for American Tourism, Exceptionalism, and Values. The only difference is that in Nick’s post, the “angel soldier” above Trump looks “normal” (as much as AI slop can look normal), while in Trump’s post it looks more like some “AI demon.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 所以那张“特朗普耶稣”的帖子早在2月4日就由尼克·亚当斯（Nick Adams）发布了，特朗普任命他为美国旅游、例外论和价值观总统特别代表。唯一的区别是，在尼克的帖子里，特朗普上方的“天使士兵”看起来很“正常”（就AI垃圾内容能达到的正常程度而言），而在特朗普的帖子里，它看起来更像某种“AI恶魔”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran is in very bad shape. I think they’re very desperate.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗现在的处境非常糟糕。我认为他们非常绝望。

text: Reporter: How is the ceasefire holding? Trump: It is holding well.
text_zh: 记者：停火协议执行得如何？特朗普：执行得很好。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Alright 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 好吧 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump posts image portraying himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: 特朗普发布了一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。

text: Trump lashes out at Pope Leo: Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church!
text_zh: 特朗普抨击教皇利奥：教皇利奥在犯罪问题上软弱无能，外交政策也一团糟。他谈论对特朗普政府的“恐惧”，却只字不提新冠疫情期间天主教会和其他所有基督教组织所感受到的恐惧，当时他们逮捕牧师、神职人员和其他所有人，仅仅因为他们举行教会仪式，甚至在户外保持十英尺甚至二十英尺距离的情况下也是如此。我喜欢他的兄弟路易斯胜过喜欢他，因为路易斯是彻头彻尾的MAGA（让美国再次伟大）。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是件可怕之事的教皇，那个国家一直在向美国输送大量毒品，更糟糕的是，他们清空了监狱，把包括杀人犯、毒贩和杀手在内的人都送进了我国。我也不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我以压倒性优势当选后该做的事，创下了犯罪率的历史新低，并创造了历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为众所周知，他是一个令人震惊的意外。他根本不在教皇候选名单上，教会之所以选他，只是因为他是美国人，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥在犯罪问题上软弱，在核武器问题上软弱，这让我很不舒服，他会见像大卫·阿克塞尔罗德（David Axelrod）这样的奥巴马同情者也让我很不舒服，那是个来自左翼的失败者，他也是那些想要逮捕教会信徒和神职人员的人之一。利奥作为教皇应该振作起来，运用常识，停止迎合激进左翼，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害很大，更重要的是，这对天主教会造成了伤害！

text: WarMonitor The mental gymnastics here are almost as disturbing as the image itself. Kinda boomer posting but he's not calling himself Jesus. He has been clear all along that he feels he is doing the work God set for him. Jesus' disciples healed the sick in His name. With Christ in us, we can do His work too. People who are outraged just wanna be https://twitter.com/MelonieMac/status/2043534889090203697/photo/1 - Melonie Mac tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这里的心理体操几乎和图片本身一样令人不安。有点像婴儿潮一代的帖子，但他并没有自称是耶稣。他一直很清楚，他觉得自己在做上帝为他设定的工作。耶稣的门徒以祂的名义治愈病人。有了基督在我们心中，我们也能做祂的工作。那些感到愤怒的人只是想找茬 https://twitter.com/MelonieMac/status/2043534889090203697/photo/1 - Melonie Mac 推文

text: 🇵🇱 💬 🇭🇺 The Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk is confident that Warsaw and Budapest will have "exceptionally good" relations with the new government. He noted that political changes in Hungary are important both for bilateral relations and for the situation in Europe as a whole, including previously blocked decisions on financing Ukraine. Tusk reported that he has already had a conversation with Peter Magyar, congratulated him on his victory and discussed his upcoming visit to Warsaw, which he previously called the destination of his first foreign trip. Tusk also added that the results of the elections in Hungary demonstrate the volatility of politics and are a "signal for those who do not believe in their own strength". 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇱 💬 🇭🇺 波兰总理唐纳德·图斯克（Donald Tusk）确信华沙和布达佩斯将与新政府保持“极其良好”的关系。他指出，匈牙利的政治变革对双边关系以及整个欧洲的局势都很重要，包括此前被搁置的关于资助乌克兰的决定。图斯克报告说，他已经与彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）进行了交谈，祝贺他获胜，并讨论了他即将对华沙进行的访问，他此前称华沙为他首次出访的目的地。图斯克还补充说，匈牙利的选举结果证明了政治的波动性，是“给那些不相信自己力量的人发出的信号”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Stop asking Grok whether something is true, I end up correcting it more than the other way around. And this is the same type of AI used to help determine who gets to see your posts. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043538806117113882/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump on Pope Leo: "I don't think he's doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess. He hit us. Think of it. He's worried about fear. What about the fear when the ministers and the priests and all of those great people that were arrested during COVID, and in many cases they're outside 10 feet apart and they were arrested. So we don't like it. We don't like a pope that's going to say that it's okay to have a nuclear weapon. We don't want a pope that says, crime is okay in our cities. I don't like it. I'm not a big fan of Pope Leo. He's a very liberal person, and he's a man that doesn't believe in stopping crime. He's a man that doesn't think that we should be toying with a country that wants a nuclear weapon so they can blow up the world. I'm not a fan of Pope Leo." U.S. President Donald Trump: "Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈教皇利奥：“我觉得他干得不怎么样。我猜他喜欢犯罪。他攻击了我们。想想看。他担心恐惧。那当牧师、神职人员和所有那些在新冠疫情期间被捕的伟大人物被捕时，那种恐惧又算什么？在许多情况下，他们是在户外保持10英尺距离时被捕的。所以我们不喜欢这样。我们不喜欢那种说拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我们不想要一个说在我们的城市里犯罪没问题的教皇。我不喜欢这样。我不太喜欢教皇利奥。他是一个非常自由派的人，他不相信应该制止犯罪。他认为我们不应该去戏弄一个想要核武器以便炸毁世界的国家。我不是教皇利奥的粉丝。” 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“教皇利奥在犯罪问题上软弱无能，外交政策也一团糟。他谈论对特朗普政府的“恐惧”，却只字不提新冠疫情期间天主教会和其他所有基督教组织所感受到的恐惧，当时他们逮捕牧师、神职人员和其他所有人，仅仅因为他们举行教会仪式，甚至在户外保持十英尺甚至二十英尺距离的情况下也是如此。我喜欢他的兄弟路易斯胜过喜欢他，因为路易斯是彻头彻尾的MAGA。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是件可怕之事的教皇，那个国家一直在向美国输送大量毒品，更糟糕的是，他们清空了监狱，把包括杀人犯、毒贩和杀手在内的人都送进了我国。我也不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我以压倒性优势当选后该做的事，创下了犯罪率的历史新低，并创造了历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为众所周知，他是一个令人震惊的意外。他根本不在教皇候选名单上，教会之所以选他，只是因为他是美国人，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥在犯罪问题上软弱，在核武器问题上软弱，这让我很不舒服，他会见像大卫·阿克塞尔罗德这样的奥巴马同情者也让我很不舒服，那是个来自左翼的失败者，他也是那些想要逮捕教会信徒和神职人员的人之一。利奥作为教皇应该振作起来，运用常识，停止迎合激进左翼，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害很大，更重要的是，这对天主教会造成了伤害！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 The Philippines says Chinese maritime vessels dumped cyanide near the BRP Sierra Madre outpost at Ayungin Shoal in the West Philippine Sea, based on chemical tests from multiple incidents between 2025 and 2026. Officials say yellow bottles retrieved from small wooden boats tested positive for cyanide, warning the substance could harm military personnel, marine life, and coral reefs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 菲律宾称，根据2025年至2026年间多次事件的化学测试，中国海警船只在西菲律宾海阿云金浅滩（Ayungin Shoal）的BRP Sierra Madre前哨基地附近倾倒了氰化物。官员们表示，从小型木船上回收的黄色瓶子检测出氰化物呈阳性，并警告称该物质可能伤害军事人员、海洋生物和珊瑚礁。@wfwitness

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 Trump: "I'm very disappointed in NATO. They weren't there for us. We pay trillions of dollars for NATO and they weren't there for us... I think that's going to be under very serious examination." 📎 Rapid Response 47
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 特朗普：“我对北约非常失望。他们没有支持我们。我们为北约支付了数万亿美元，而他们却没有支持我们……我认为这将受到非常严肃的审查。” 📎 快速反应 47

text: Today (April 12), Hezbollah published a total of 60 statements regarding recent operations targeting Israel and the IDF in Israel and southern Lebanon, up from 46 on April 11. This brings their total stated operations since the beginning of the war to 1,711, with an average of 40.74 per day since March 2. Note: Hezbollah only announces a small fraction of the total operations carried out against the IDF, and often combines multiple attacks into one statement. This graph only counts total Hezbollah statements.
text_zh: 今天（4月12日），真主党共发布了60份关于近期针对以色列和以色列国防军在以色列及黎巴嫩南部行动的声明，高于4月11日的46份。这使得他们自战争开始以来的声明行动总数达到1,711次，自3月2日以来平均每天40.74次。注：真主党仅宣布了针对以色列国防军所进行行动的一小部分，并且经常将多次袭击合并为一份声明。此图表仅统计真主党的声明总数。

text: WarMonitor Do you want a war with China? Because this is how you get a war with China. The longer the Iran war goes on, the more China suffers. Everyone would like the war to end quickly. But the negative impact on China can't be ignored. - Anthony Pompliano 🌪 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 你想要和中国开战吗？因为这就是你如何引发与中国战争的方式。伊朗战争持续的时间越长，中国受到的损失就越大。每个人都希望战争尽快结束。但对中国造成的负面影响不容忽视。 - 安东尼·庞普利亚诺（Anthony Pompliano） 🌪 推文

text: 🐻 Here's all the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf commented on the talks with the US saying "The United States failed to gain Iran’s trust in response to our initiatives." ➡️ Erdogan criticizes new Israel death penalty for Palestinians ➡️ Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Masoud Pezeshkian ➡️ Trump announces the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, and says NATO will now come and help "clean up the strait" but UK immediately says they are not about that life , and Australia isn't either. However, Trump claims that many countries will help ➡️ IRGC Navy tells Trump that any wrong step in the Strait of Hormuz will put the enemy in deadly whirlpools ➡️ Trump threatens China over help to Iran again, and is upset with the Pope , and apparently sees himself as Jesus now..? ➡️ Israel strikes Lebanon ➡️ Peter Magyar wins the elections 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 以下是过去24小时的所有关键新闻：➡️ 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）评论与美国的会谈时说：“美国未能通过回应我们的倡议来赢得伊朗的信任。” ➡️ 埃尔多安批评以色列针对巴勒斯坦人的新死刑法 ➡️ 弗拉基米尔·普京与马苏德·佩泽什基安（Masoud Pezeshkian）通了电话 ➡️ 特朗普宣布封锁霍尔木兹海峡，并称北约现在会来帮助“清理海峡”，但英国立即表示他们不想参与其中，澳大利亚也不想。然而，特朗普声称许多国家会提供帮助 ➡️ 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军告诉特朗普，在霍尔木兹海峡的任何错误举动都会将敌人置于致命的漩涡中 ➡️ 特朗普再次威胁中国不要帮助伊朗，并对教皇感到不满，而且显然现在把自己看作是耶稣了……？ ➡️ 以色列袭击黎巴嫩 ➡️ 彼得·马扎尔赢得选举 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 15 on mass emigration wave: "The new emigrants are no longer ashamed, on the contrary." Israelis cite security, economic, and mental difficulties: "The ethos of sacrifice has become very shallow. You can't ask people to sacrifice when they no longer believe they're sacrificing for something right." The report compares it to pre-October 7th refusal movements, when "our enemies invaded our borders because they thought we were weak." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列第15频道关于大规模移民潮的报道：“新移民不再感到羞耻，恰恰相反。”以色列人列举了安全、经济和心理方面的困难：“牺牲的精神已经变得非常肤浅。当人们不再相信他们是在为正确的事情牺牲时，你就不能要求他们牺牲。”该报告将其与10月7日之前的拒绝服役运动进行了比较，当时“我们的敌人入侵了我们的边界，因为他们认为我们很软弱。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Insane. From going after the Pope to this… speaks for itself. President Trump posts an AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus on Truth Social https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043514644724134281/photo/1 - Faytuks Network tweet

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 If this report from Barak Ravid is accurate, these aren’t negotiations, these are humiliating surrender terms designed to strip Iran of its dignity and defense capabilities. Iran has every right to spit on these humiliating surrender terms and reject them with contempt.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 如果巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）的这份报告准确，那么这些根本不是谈判，而是旨在剥夺伊朗尊严和防御能力的羞辱性投降条款。伊朗完全有权唾弃这些羞辱性的投降条款，并予以蔑视地拒绝。

text: WarMonitor That assumes China and other Asian economies can and are willing to pivot overnight, they can’t. Now regional partners absorb the fallout and blame the U.S. even more, while Americans pay higher prices. At this point, it’s hard to see a strategy at all, just an effort to make it look like there is one. Honestly, Trump ordering navy to block the Strait of Hormuz is a pretty smart strategy. It took away the only Trump card that IRAN has while re-routing the global oil dependency to US. However, it’s unsure whether US or IRAN can afford longer in this case. I don’t think a country that couldn’t afford the market to dip 15% can outlast a country has been economically sanctioned for 40 years. - Mao BaoBao tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这假设中国和其他亚洲经济体能够并且愿意在一夜之间转型，但他们做不到。现在区域合作伙伴吸收了后果，并更加责怪美国，而美国人却支付了更高的价格。在这一点上，很难看出有什么战略，只是努力让它看起来像是有战略一样。老实说，特朗普命令海军封锁霍尔木兹海峡是一个相当聪明的战略。它夺走了伊朗唯一的王牌，同时将全球石油依赖重新导向美国。然而，在这种情况下，美国或伊朗是否能负担得起长期封锁尚不确定。我不认为一个连市场下跌15%都承受不起的国家，能比一个被经济制裁了40年的国家撑得更久。 - Mao BaoBao 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump on negotiations with Iran: Oh, I don’t know. I don’t care if they come back or not. If they don’t come back, I’m fine. Their military is gone. Their missiles are largely depleted. The manufacturing capability for missiles and drones is largely defeated. We’ve been very nice. We haven’t taken down too many bridges. We did one only because they broke their word. They broke their promise. And remember, their promise was that they were going to open the Hormuz Strait. They didn’t do it. They lied. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈与伊朗的谈判：哦，我不知道。我不在乎他们是否回来。如果他们不回来，我没意见。他们的军队已经完了。他们的导弹基本耗尽。导弹和无人机的制造能力基本被摧毁。我们已经很客气了。我们没有摧毁太多的桥梁。我们只摧毁了一座，那是因为他们违背了诺言。他们违背了他们的承诺。记住，他们的承诺是他们会开放霍尔木兹海峡。他们没有做到。他们撒谎了。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : Oil tankers are avoiding the Strait of Hormuz due to a US blockade set to begin on Monday, following failed peace talks between the US and Iran. Pakistan-flagged vessels Shalamar and Khairpur entered the Gulf, with Shalamar heading to the United Arab Emirates to load Das crude and Khairpur bound for Kuwait to load refined products. At the same time, mixed traffic patterns were observed. The Liberia-flagged VLCC Mombasa B successfully transited the strait and is now operating in the Gulf, while the Malta-flagged Agios Fanourios I turned back after attempting to enter and is anchored near the Gulf of Oman. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：由于美国封锁定于周一开始，在美伊和平谈判失败后，油轮正在避开霍尔木兹海峡。悬挂巴基斯坦国旗的“Shalamar”号和“Khairpur”号船只进入了海湾，“Shalamar”号前往阿拉伯联合酋长国装载Das原油，“Khairpur”号前往科威特装载成品油。与此同时，观察到了混合的交通模式。悬挂利比里亚国旗的超大型油轮“Mombasa B”号成功通过了海峡，目前正在海湾作业，而悬挂马耳他国旗的“Agios Fanourios I”号在试图进入后折返，目前停泊在阿曼湾附近。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇦U.S. President Trump clarified his comments about Pope Leo XIV liking crime: "I don't think he's doing a very good job. He likes crime, I guess. He, he hit us. Think of it. He's worried about fear. What about the fear when the ministers and the priests…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump expressed disappointment that NATO didn't come to help the U.S. fast enough during the conflict with Iran. "Well, they're coming up. They're gonna be coming up. But I'm very disappointed in NATO. They didn't do the they weren't there for us. We pay trillions of dollars for NATO, and they weren't there for us. Remember what I said. NATO was not there. Now they wanna come up, but there's no real threat anymore. But NATO was not there for us." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇦美国总统特朗普澄清了他关于教皇利奥十四世喜欢犯罪的评论：“我觉得他干得不怎么样。我猜他喜欢犯罪。他，他攻击了我们。想想看。他担心恐惧。那当牧师、神职人员……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示对北约在与伊朗冲突期间没有足够快地来帮助美国感到失望。“好吧，他们正在赶来。他们会赶来的。但我对北约非常失望。他们没有做……他们没有支持我们。我们为北约支付了数万亿美元，而他们却没有支持我们。记住我说过的话。北约没有支持我们。现在他们想来，但已经没有真正的威胁了。但北约当时没有支持我们。” @wfwitness

text: — I’m not a Christian. Nor am I particularly fond of Pope Leo XIV. In fact, quite the opposite. But, whether you like it or not, the Pope represents the religion of 1.4 billion Catholics worldwide. And, in a general sense, the Pope as an institution has always been an advocate for peace around the world, whether we agree with their specific statements or not (as Muslims we certainly have our reservations) Pope Francis for example did a lot for Gaza, he spoke out openly against Israel many times, and he was overall a mostly respectable man. Anyway, Trump needs to put some respect on Pope Leo’s name. Catholics can’t keep allowing him to use their religion only when it benefits him, then thrashing the Pope on a random Monday evening during an ego trip. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 我不是基督徒。我也不特别喜欢教皇利奥十四世。事实上，恰恰相反。但是，无论你喜欢与否，教皇代表着全世界14亿天主教徒的宗教。而且，从总体意义上讲，教皇作为一个机构一直是世界和平的倡导者，无论我们是否同意他们的具体声明（作为穆斯林，我们当然有保留意见）。例如，教皇方济各为加沙做了很多事，他多次公开反对以色列，总体上是一个大部分时间都值得尊敬的人。无论如何，特朗普需要对教皇利奥的名字表示尊重。天主教徒不能一直允许他只在对自己有利时才利用他们的宗教，然后在某个随意的周一晚上因为自我膨胀而抨击教皇。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: Me and my friends be like:
text_zh: 我和我的朋友们是这样的：

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ "I don't think he's doing a very good job. HE LIKES CRIME, I guess... I'm not a big fan of Pope Leo. He's a very LIBERAL person -- and he's a man that doesn't believe in stopping crime."
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ “我觉得他干得不怎么样。我猜他喜欢犯罪……我不太喜欢教皇利奥。他是一个非常自由派的人——他不相信应该制止犯罪。”
